abilities.description: Add one mana of any type that a land you control could produce. If CARDNAME has a +1/+1 counter on it, add three mana of that type instead.

effect.description: Add one mana of any type that a land you control could produce. If CARDNAME has a +1/+1 counter on it, add three mana of that type instead.
effect.name: ManaReflected
